name: Fudgey German Chocolate Sandwich Cookies
recipeInstructions:
COCONUT AND PECAN FILLING
1/2 cup butter or margarine
1/2 cup packed light brown sugar
1/4 cup light corn syrup
1 cup Mounds Sweetened Coconut Flakes -- toasted
1 cup pecans -- finely chopped
1 teaspoon vanilla
Heat oven to 350°F.
Stir together flour, sugar, butter, cocoa, baking soda and salt in a large bowl.
Add eggs, milk and vanilla; beat on medium speed of an electric mixer until blended.
Dough will be stiff. Stir in pecans.
Shape dough into 1 1/4 inch balls. Place on ungreased cookie sheet; flatten slightly.
Bake 9 to 11 minutes or until almost set. Cool slightly; remove from cookie sheet to wire rack.
Cool completely.
Prepare Coconut and Pecan filling. Put cookies together in pairs with about 1 heaping tablespoon filling for each cookie. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Directions for Filling:
Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat; add brown sugar and corn syrup. Stir constantly until thick and bubbly. Remove from heat; stir in coconut, pecans and vanilla. Use warm. Makes about 2 cups.
